scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.cpSync('frontend/.next', '.next', {recursive:true}); if(fs.existsSync('frontend/public')){fs.cpSync('frontend/public', 'public', {recursive:true});} if(fs.existsSync('frontend/next.config.ts')){fs.copyFileSync('frontend/next.config.ts', 'next.config.ts');}"
